info.name: Investor Tracking APIs
info.description: API collection for Morval Investor authentication and management system

item.name: Auth

request.description: Create admin account (role=2). Returns user data and auth tokens. Auto-saves tokens to collection variables.
Login with email, password and role. Returns user data, auth tokens, and requires_password_change flag if using temporary credentials. Auto-saves tokens to collection variables.
Change from temporary password to permanent password. User must be authenticated and in temporary state (temp_signup=1).

Request password reset. Generates fp_token and sends reset link via email. Returns generic success message regardless of email existence (prevents account enumeration). Works for both admin and investor roles.
Verify forgot password token validity. Returns success with user_id if token is valid and account is active. Returns error if token is invalid, expired, or account is inactive.

Reset password using valid fp_token. Updates password, clears fp_token, and transitions temporary accounts to permanent state (temp_signup=0). Returns error if token is invalid or account is inactive.
Change password for authenticated users (both admin and investor). Requires verification of old password before setting new password. User must be authenticated.

Update user profile information for authenticated users. Investors can only update their own profile. Admins can update any user's profile by providing user_id parameter. At least one field must be provided. Returns updated user data.

Delete authenticated user's account (investors only). Marks account as deleted (status=-1), soft-deletes related bank details, invalidates auth tokens, and sends confirmation email. Admin accounts cannot be deleted through this endpoint. Returns error if account is already deleted. Requires authentication via apikey and token headers.

item.description: Authentication endpoints for signup, login and password management

item.name: Admin

request.description: Admin-only endpoint to get bank details with optional status filter. Returns list of bank details with investor information. Supports pagination and status filtering. Default shows pending (status=0) bank details.

Admin-only endpoint to approve or reject investor bank details. Requires bank_details_id and action ('approve' or 'reject'). If rejecting, reject_reason is required. Only pending bank details (status=0) can be reviewed.
Admin-only endpoint to get dashboard statistics including total investors, capital under management, average monthly return, and pending bank details.
Admin-only endpoint to create new investor account with temporary credentials. Initial capital must be at least 500,000. Sends email with credentials and returns plaintext temp_password.

Admin-only endpoint to regenerate temporary password for existing investor. Only works if investor is still in temporary state (temp_signup=1). Admin can either provide a custom temp_password or let the system auto-generate one. Sends new credentials via email.
Admin-only endpoint to generate a secure temporary password. Returns a random password meeting security requirements.

Admin-only endpoint to get all investors with pagination and search. Returns list of investors with their profile data. Supports search by name/email and status filtering. Excludes deleted users by default.

Admin-only endpoint to update investor account status. Can activate (1), set to pending (0), disable (2), or delete (-1) investor accounts. Sends notification to investor except for delete status. Returns old and new status values.
Admin-only endpoint to add monthly performance data for an investor. Calculates portfolio value and updates investor's current_portfolio. Sends notification to investor.

Admin-only endpoint to add monthly performance data for ALL active investors at once. Applies the same profit amount or percentage to all investors. Calculates portfolio values and updates each investor's current_portfolio. Sends notifications to all investors. Returns summary with successful, failed, and skipped records.

Admin-only endpoint to delete monthly performance records. Automatically recalculates investor's current_portfolio via database trigger. Sends notification to investor. Returns deleted record details.

Admin-only endpoint to update existing monthly performance records. Recalculates portfolio value based on previous month's data and sends notification to investor. Returns both old and new values for audit trail. Either profit_amount or profit_percentage must be provided.

response.name: Error - Performance Record Not Found
Error - Missing Profit Data
Error - Negative Portfolio Value

request.description: Admin-only endpoint to get historical performance records with filters. Returns all performance records with investor details, supports search and filtering by investor, month, year, minimum profit percentage, and date ranges. Supports both exact date filtering (from_date/to_date) and month/year range filtering (from_month/from_year to to_month/to_year).

Admin-only endpoint to get historical performance chart data. Returns aggregated performance data for all investors or specific investor. Supports different time periods and chart types with summary statistics. Includes total_active_investors, total_capital_under_management, and avg_monthly_profit. Follows pagination pattern like get_all_investors.

item.description: Admin-only endpoints for investor management. Requires admin role (role=2).

item.name: Investor

request.description: Get investor data by ID. Investors can only access their own data. Admins can access any investor's data. Returns investor profile information.
Get investor bank details by user ID. Investors can only access their own bank details. Admins can access any investor's bank details. Returns latest bank details with status and review information.

Add bank details for investor account. Investors can only add bank details for themselves. Admins can add bank details for any investor by providing user_id parameter. Submits bank details with pending status (0) for admin review. Prevents duplicate submissions if pending or approved details already exist. Returns bank_details_id and status.

Update existing bank details. Investors can only update their own bank details. Admins can update bank details for any investor by providing user_id parameter. If bank details are pending (status=0), updates the existing record allowing investors to fix mistakes before admin review. If bank details are approved (status=1) or rejected (status=2), creates a new record with pending status for admin review. Returns bank_details_id and status.
Get investor dashboard data including initial capital, current portfolio, current month profit, and total metrics. Investors can only access their own data. Admins can access any investor's data.
Get investor performance history with formatted data and chart data. Returns monthly performance records ordered by date.
Get optimized chart data for performance visualization. Returns labels and datasets formatted for chart libraries.

item.description: Investor-specific endpoints. Investors can access own data, admins can access any investor data.

item.name: Notifications

request.description: Get notifications for the authenticated user. Supports pagination with limit and offset parameters. Can filter by read/unread status. Returns notifications ordered by creation date (newest first).
Get notification counts for the authenticated user. Returns total count, unread count, and read count of notifications.

variable.description: Notification ID to mark as read

request.description: Mark a specific notification as read for the authenticated user. Only the notification owner can mark their own notifications as read. Returns success response with updated notification.
Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user. Returns success response with count of notifications marked as read.
Delete a specific notification for the authenticated user. Only the notification owner can delete their own notifications. Returns success response.

Register or update FCM token for push notifications. Associates the token with the authenticated user's account. Supports multiple devices per user. Optional endpoint for mobile push notification support.

item.description: Notification endpoints for retrieving and managing user notifications. All endpoints require authentication. Users can only access their own notifications.

item.name: Calculator

request.description: Calculate estimated investment returns using compound interest. This is a public endpoint (no authentication required). Returns invested amount, monthly return rate, duration, average monthly return, total returns, final amount, and effective annual return rate.

item.description: Public calculator endpoint for estimating investment returns using compound interest formula.
